heading: Why most local businesses disappear on social media.
transition: This cycle has a solution. And it doesn't require an agency.

cards.statement: They don't know what to post
cards.title: They don't know what to post
cards.description: Without method, strategy, or time, most local businesses post randomly — or simply stop posting.

cards.title: No consistency, no reach
cards.description: The algorithm penalizes inactive accounts. Every week without posts is a week your competitor gains ground.

cards.title: Zero competitive visibility
cards.description: You don't know what competitors post, what they ignore, or where the gaps are to dominate the local conversation.

cards.title: Content doesn't generate leads
cards.description: Posts without CTA and local context don't convert. Likes don't pay the bills — and most organic content never reaches buyers.
